word: G3673 - ὁμότεχνος - homótechnos - hom-ot'-ekh-nos - Of the same craft

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁμότεχνος

- Transliteration: Homotechnos

- Phonetic: hom-ot'-ekh-nos

- Definition:

1. practising the same trade or craft, of the same trade

- Origin: from the base of G3674 and G5078

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From the base of G3674 and G5078; a fellow artificer: - of the same craft.
